name: get_qor_ruledecks
short_description: Get a list of QoR ruledecks
full_help:
get_qor_ruledecks

Description: 
Get a list of QoR ruledecks

Syntax: 
get_qor_ruledecks  [-filter <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Returns: 
List of QoR ruledecks

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-filter]   Filter list with given expression
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Netlist, Project

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
